meaning: adj.机械的,机械制的,机械似的,呆板的
examples: The breakdown was due to a mechanical failure.
It is real prayer, and not mechanical repetition.
This is the oldest working mechanical clock in the world.
Could something as dumb and as mechanical as a robotic test tube compete with old-fashioned ingenuity?
Flat tires are common on trips like this, but so are bigger mechanical problems.
